title: habenaria loloorum
intro: Habenaria loloorum, also known as Lolo's Habenaria, is a rare orchid species endemic to the Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Habenaria loloorum are believed to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used separately for different medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
